arts.ttl: Manchester United step up interest in Atalanta’s Ederson
arts.sum: Atalanta's Ederson has emerged as one of the most sought-after midfielders in European football, with Manchester United intensifying their interest in the Brazilian star. The 25-year-old's impressive performances have been crucial to Atalanta's success this season, as they currently sit second in Serie A and are performing well in the Champions League. The post Manchester United step up interest in Atalanta’s Ederson appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp has already told Pep Guardiola when he should leave Man City as situation worsens
arts.sum: The iconic former Liverpool manager departed Anfield this summer as speculation continues to swirl around Pep Guardiola and his Manchester City future.

arts.ttl: Meet the striker Man United released who went on to become a Man City legend well before Pep Guardiola arrived
Everton need to be different in the transfer market under Friedkin Group - I've been there myself
arts.sum: Michael Ball delivers his Christmas wishes for Everton's transfer approach following the takeover by the Friedkin Group

arts.ttl: I quit Man City for the right reasons but 12 months later I was without a club - now I'm rebuilding my career
arts.sum: Isaac Buckley-Ricketts left Manchester City in 2018 having starred in Youth Cup finals and won the European Under-19 Championships with England. Now he is fighting back up the football pyramid

arts.ttl: Ipswich lineup vs. Arsenal : Predicted XI for Premier League clash as Kalvin Phillips starts
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Ipswich Town could line up for Friday's Premier League clash with Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola's reason for quitting rings alarm bells - now Man City must find new message
arts.sum: Manchester City are undergoing the kind of crisis we just haven't seen at the Etihad under Pep Guardiola - or indeed during the Catalan's managerial career - and despite a new contract, his long-term future has to be in question

arts.ttl: Man United next five fixtures compared to Arsenal, Man City and Tottenham after Christmas
arts.sum: Manchester United news as Ruben Amorim looks to bring the festive spirit to his side towards the end of 2024

arts.ttl: Manchester City vs. Everton: Pep Guardiola must beat Sean Dyche in Premier League Boxing Day fixture
arts.sum: Manchester City must overcome Sean Dyche's Everton on Boxing Day considering the Toffees do not pose much threat, unlike sides such as Bournemouth.

arts.ttl: I didn't want to leave Man City - but one phone call made it clear I wasn't wanted
arts.sum: Manchester City owe a lot to Gareth Barry, but had to make a brutal decision about his future when he left on loan for Everton in 2013
